responses.welcome: Welcome to Bucherim. You are now connected and can start asking questions.
responses.not_approved: You are not currently approved for Bucherim. Text join@bucherim to request access.
responses.join_ack: Your request to join Bucherim has been received and will be reviewed.
responses.already_active: You are already connected to Bucherim. Ask me anything.
responses.not_member: You are not currently a Bucherim member. Text @bucherim if approved, or join@bucherim to request access.
responses.blocked: Your access to Bucherim is currently blocked. Text join@bucherim to request a review.
responses.media_unavailable: I received your media, but image analysis is not enabled yet. Please describe what you need in text.
responses.image_generation_unavailable: I can discuss images, but outbound image generation is not enabled yet.
